Video.summary: Are you looking for fast cash but feel you don't have the skills well our guests today have started a family business…they're selling sex and they're ready to reveal their secrets!
Video.title: The Hooker Family Hour

Video.summary: Fritz will do anything to help his cousin out - even sleep with his fiancee! Bradley's mom and wife confront him over his affair with his mom's doppelganger!
Video.title: Strange Secret Affairs!

Video.summary: Stripper Tiny wants to get Brandon away from his baby's mother; Brad decides to take matters into his own hands when his wife refuses to quit stripping.
Video.title: High End Stripper Smackdown

Video.summary: Insecure Star likes Deandre, but he prefers her stripper cousin; Dominic has a confession to make to his girlfriend; Kristin cheats with her husband's teenage nephew.
Video.title: I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry

Image.alt: I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry
I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry
I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry

Video.summary: Crystal found evidence to believe that Chad may really be stepping out on their marriage. Then, Shanna is here to confront her boyfriend Kevin because she has evidence to believe that he's been sleeping with other women!
Video.title: Cheaters Put On Blast

Video.summary: These guests say they are willing to betray family and friends in their quest to find a lover.
Video.title: Angry Lovers Attack!!

Video.summary: David has been married to Linda for 3 years and has been living in his car for 2˝ of them! He claims that her children won't allow him in the house and in order to save his marriage, he camps out in his car parked next to their home.
Video.title: I Live In A Car!

Video.summary: John weighs almost 700 pounds and couldn't be happier. HIs girlfriend Kim goes so far as to make him choose between her and a 10-foot long sandwich! He chooses the sandwich.
Video.title: A Man and His Food: A Love Story!

Image.alt: A Man and His Food: A Love Story!
A Man and His Food: A Love Story!
A Man and His Food: A Love Story!

Video.summary: Glenda has been hiding two secrets from her boyfriend: She's secretly been seeing her ex and she wants to be a stripper! Then Veronica broke up with Roland when she caught him cheating. Now she's dating one of his friends and Roland wants her back.
Video.title: Secrets Come Out

Video.summary: Mr. Panama is back and still cannot decide which girl he wants to be with. Next Chauntey is a transsexual who’s cheating with her lover's brother! Later Chris is back and he's still trying to play Dee and Rhonda at the same time.
Video.title: Unforgettable Guests Return

Video.summary: Kiki taught Kat the ropes whens he started in the strip clubs and then they became lovers. But now Kat is dumping Kiki for a man! Later Cedric is here to tell his girlfriend that he wants to join him in a threesome with his secret lover, Eric!
Video.title: Two-timers Confronted

Video.summary: Nick is here to tell his soon to be wife Ashley that he's been cheating on her with two different women! Plus, Shea is here and worried sick that her husband Adam may have had a little too much fun on a recent trip the couple took together.
Video.title: Stripper Spring Fling

Video.summary: It's Jerry's birthday and he's throwing one heck of a wild birthday bash! It's a wild birthday spectacular on today's Jerry Springer!
Video.title: Happy Birthday Mr. Springer

Video.summary: After Mike became a dad, he felt trapped and bored from fatherhood and found Liz! Sherrie fights to win Don back from his gay lover Warren! Gloria’s matchmaking days are over as her best friend Andrea slept with her fiancé!
Video.title: I Need More Than You

Video.summary: Kejana’s aunt Rose moved in with her and her man Dicoy. Dicoy ended up cheating with Rose! Can Ruben get Selena to leave his best friend Scott? Eddie had a fling with transsexual Chloe, but then his girlfriend’s father found out!
Video.title: Down and Dirty Affairs

Video.summary: A transgender man has second thoughts about marrying a woman; Germaine wants his ex to take him back and reveals a secret; Stormie's husband gives her an ultimatum.
Video.title: Auditioning New Girlfriends

Video.summary: Tia says she has proof that her brother-in-law cheats on her sister; Maranda wants to get back together with her ex-fiance but believes it could stir up problems with her best friend; Kaila wants a threesome.
Video.title: Man Snatching Sister

Video.summary: Sarah confronts her boyfriend and the woman with whom he is rumored to have had a rendezvous; Thomas professes an emotional connection to his friend's girlfriend; Tootie breaks bad news to her boyfriend and his meddling sister.
Video.title: A Hot Minute

Video.summary: Josh says his world was ruined once his girlfriend gave birth to their child, so he slept with her sister; Derrick wants to dump his boyfriend so that he can be single, free and able to do his own thing.
Video.title: Don't Settle for My Sister ... Pick Me

Image.alt: Don't Settle for My Sister ... Pick Me
Don't Settle for My Sister ... Pick Me
Don't Settle for My Sister ... Pick Me

Video.summary: Convict love stories! It's Jerry's jailbird special and he's got two sexy prisoners of love and one mini feisty officer to help keep the inmates in order.
Video.title: Back Off My Jailbird Lover!

Video.summary: Janie was born without hands or feet but has beaten the odds and started a family.
Video.title: Love Against The Odds

Video.summary: Roger returns to break up his daughter’s relationship with a male stripper and twins fight over the same girl!
Video.title: Invasion of the Little People

Video.summary: Preston is ready to ditch Jessica for cheating. Then, can KB justify falling for Krystal’s god-sister even?
Video.title: "Let Me At Her!"

Video.summary: Crystal gets a fistful of hair when she confronts her boyfriend about his mistress.
Video.title: Attack of the Scorned Lovers

Video.summary: Lexie says her husband's ex, Stacy, is trying to destroy her marriage and she is putting a stop to it!
Video.title: I Slept With Your Lover!

Video.summary: Deuce is here to finally come clean with his wife and tell her that he's been sleeping with their friend.
Video.title: The Babysitter Stole My Husband!

Video.summary: Chloe and Dan will tie the knot soon, but she’s finally ready to tell him she’s a call girl. Amanda’s mom begs her to quit prostitution later.
Video.title: Honey… I'm A Call Girl

Video.summary: Tempers flare when Belinda's husband finds out she's cheating, but he thinks it's his fault and asks for forgiveness. Next Twist will reveal a huge secret to his fiancee ... he is really a woman!
Video.title: Unforgivable Secrets!

Video.summary: Jon wants to start fresh and come clean to his fiancee about his secret affair. But first, his secret lover, Kirn, has some news for him! Then Racquel doesn't know why she's here, but when the babysitter arrives, she figures it out in a hurry!
Video.title: I Want Your Lover!

Video.summary: Tony admits to his girlfriend that he likes to dress in women's clothes and that he secretly has a boyfriend! Next James says his wife moved back home with him but she also brought her new boyfriend!
Video.title: Bisexual Betrayals

Video.summary: Angelo is here to tell his girlfriend that he's a woman. Next, Mikey brought his girlfriend here to tell her that he's been cheating on her. But she has surprise of her own. Later Jennifer feels she must tell her lover the truth about her sexuality
Video.title: I'm Lying to my Lover

Video.summary: Lynne kicked her husband out for cheating and now he's living in her front yard in a box! Next Sam says he's always wanted to see 2 women sleep together so he made a peculiar agreement with his cousin.
Video.title: I Live In A Box!

Video.summary: Crystal has been sending explicit photos to her roommate's boyfriend; Kevin wants to give Jessica a dream wedding; Mario wants to confess.
Video.title: Fling Fall Outs
